Surface for Business computer, laptop, and tablet accessories

Employees love the Surface experience, made complete with accessories purpose-built for Surface devices. Most Surface for Business computer accessories are universal, compatible across generations. The investment your business makes in accessories is designed to last.
  • Keyboards
  • Pen and mice
  • Power, docks and adapters
  • Designed for Surface
  • Surface Hub

Microsoft Adaptive Accessories

Discover a customizable mouse and an adaptable hub that augments traditional keyboards. With unique mouse attachments and inputs users can create a system that works for them.
Learn more Where to buy

  • Microsoft Adaptive Accessories

    Hub, joystick and mouse with adaptative choices to customize your Surface experience.

    Where to buy

  • Microsoft Adaptive Mouse

    Use the mouse core by itself as a comfortable, compact mouse. Connect wirelessly or via USB-C.

  • Microsoft Adaptive Mouse Tail and Thumb Support

    Attaches to the mouse core. The thumb support accessory switches sides for left or right handedness.

  • Microsoft Adaptive Hub

    Connects to up to three devices wirelessly or via USB-C, or wirelessly to up to four Adaptive Buttons.

  • Microsoft Adaptive D-pad Button

    Pair the D-pad Button with the Adaptive Hub to suit your needs, and program sequence macros to simplify complex tasks.

  • Microsoft Adaptive Joystick Button

    Pair the Joystick with the Adaptive Hub to suit your needs, and program sequence macros to simplify complex tasks.

  • Microsoft Adaptive Dual Button

    Pair the Dual Button with the Adaptive Hub to suit your needs, and program sequence macros to simplify complex tasks.

Surface Pro Flex Keyboard

Attached to the Pro,2 it's the ultimate laptop setup. Detached,3 use as a standalone keyboard for unrivalled flexibility in any workspace, with up to 41 hours of continuous typing.4
Large, inclusive haptic touchpad and quiet, comfortable typing. 
Find out more Watch the video

  • Full keyboard experiences

    There’s a keyboard for every Surface computer that helps you be your most productive.

    Where to buy

  • Surface Pro 12-inch Keyboard with bold keyset

    Featuring a bolder font and a brighter backlight for an inclusive, easier typing experience.

    Available Colors

  • Surface Pro 13-inch Flex Keyboard

    Use attached or detached. With large, haptic touchpad. Available with optional Surface Slim Pen.

    Available Colors

  • Surface Pro 13-inch Flex Keyboard with bold keyset

    The most inclusive 2-in-1 keyboard on the market. With large haptic touchpad and Surface Slim Pen storage.

    Available Colors

  • Surface Pro 13-inch Keyboard

    Transform your Surface from tablet to laptop. With optional Surface Slim Pen storage.

    Available Colors

  • Surface Pro 13-inch Keyboard with Slim Pen

    Transform your Surface from tablet to laptop. Includes Surface Slim Pen.

    Available Colors

  • Surface Pro 13-inch Keyboard with bold keyset

    The keyboard with an easier to read bold keyset. With Surface Slim Pen storage.

    Available Colors

  • Surface Keyboard

    Sleek design and seamless Bluetooth pairing deliver clean, modern workspaces.

Surface Slim Pen

Write, sketch, navigate, and recharge.1 Take handwritten notes and draw with the same feeling you get with pen on paper, with exceptional accuracy and a storable design. Surface Slim Pen delivers incredible shading and pressure sensitivity.
Where to buy

  • Pen and mice

    Interact more naturally with your devices with digital pen, mice, and seamless task transitions.

    Where to buy

  • Surface Slim Pen

    Write and sketch with the feeling of pen on paper and a rechargeable design.1

  • Surface Pen

    Write comfortably with precision ink and virtually no lag.

    Available Colors

  • Microsoft Business Pen

    A digital pen that makes it easy to fill out forms and collect signatures. Available in packs of 10.

  • Surface Arc Mouse

    Slim, light, and ready to travel, Surface Arc Mouse is designed to conform to your hand and snaps flat to fit easily in your bag.

    Available Colors

Surface USB4 Dock

The essential dock for productivity and connectivity. Optimize with 65W power delivery, data transfer up to 40 Gbps, and dual 4K monitor support via USB-C® or HDMI.
Learn more

  • Power, docks, and adapters

    Charge batteries, connect to external displays and peripherals, and extend your ports.

    Where to buy Compare docks

  • Surface USB4 Dock

    Up to 40 Gbps of data speed, and 65W of power delivery, plus multiple ports and dual 4K monitor support.
    Learn more

  • Surface Thunderbolt™ 4 Dock

    Connect and power your Thunderbolt™ 4 devices, transfer data fast, and connect two 4K monitors.
    Learn more

  • Surface Dock 2

    Turn your Surface into a desktop PC, charge your device, and access peripherals.

  • Surface USB-C Travel Hub

    Get five ways to connect to networks, displays and more, including USB-C.

  • Surface 45W USB-C® Wall Charger

    Universal USB-C® power supply designed to charge your Surface device with 45W of power via USB-C. Sleek, compact design.

  • Surface Adapters

    Extend your USB-C, tap into Ethernet, and share content on VGA- and HDMI-compatible displays.

  • Designed for Surface

    Accessories Designed for Surface are third-party accessories designed especially for Surface devices, and meet rigorous standards.

    Learn more Where to buy

  • Ruggedized cases

    Durably designed to keep your devices safe in extreme work environments.

  • Screen protectors

    Protect your screen from privacy and extreme use, while working with touchscreen and digital pen.

  • Computer locks

    Help for securing your Surface devices from theft.

  • POS stands

    Hands-free stands and mounts that are built to last and help prevent theft.

  • Surface Hub accessories

    Enable teamwork anywhere with accessories designed by Microsoft and in collaboration with our partners.

    Where to buy Learn about Surface Hub

  • Surface Hub Smart Camera

    Surface Hub Smart Camera captures in-room movement and interaction, giving remote participants a more inclusive meeting experience.

  • Surface Hub 2 Camera

    Surface Hub 2 Camera is a 4K camera that captures the room and conference participants in a full field of view.

  • Surface Hub Pen

    Precise inking for the large screen that is so responsive, it feels just like ink is flowing from the pen tip.

  • Salamander Stands

    Take control of collaboration workspaces with Salamander’s Electric Lift motorized wall and mobile stands.

  • APC™ Charge

    Unplug Surface Hub 3 50-inch and work with your teams wherever inspiration strikes.

Buy and deploy Surface accessories

Microsoft authorized resellers can help you buy, deploy, and manage Surface for your business.
Where to buy


Surface warranty and protection plans

Microsoft Protection Plans help you maximize your investment in Surface so you can hit the ground running and stay productive when issues arise.
See Surface warranty options

  • Designed for the modern workplace

    The Surface for Business portfolio delivers experiences employees love with the choice and flexibility they need to work on their terms.

    Where to buy Compare devices
  • New

    Surface Pro for Business, 13-inch | Intel

    Starting at $1,949.49

    Fast, workday-ready performance powered by the next-gen Intel® Core™ Ultra processor (Series 3), with built-in AI and optional 5G for productivity anywhere.

    • Intel® Core™ Ultra processor (Series 3)
    • AI experiences powered by a dedicated NPU
    • 13-inch PixelSense™ Flow touchscreen with optional OLED
    • Optional 5G connectivity
    • All-day battery life
    Meet Surface Pro
  • New

    Surface Laptop for Business, 13.8 and 15-inch | Intel

    Starting at $1,949.99

    Reliable Intel® Core™ Ultra processor (Series 3) performance with on-device AI, plus an integrated privacy screen on select models for added security.

    • Intel® Core™ Ultra processor (Series 3)
    • AI experiences powered by a dedicated NPU
    • 13.8-inch or 15-inch PixelSense™ Flow touchscreen
    • Integrated privacy screen on select models
    • All-day battery life
    Meet Surface Laptop
  • New

    Surface Laptop for Business, 13-inch | Intel

    Starting at $1,499.99

    Powerful AI productivity in a lightweight laptop with the latest Intel® Core™ Ultra processor (Series 3) performance.

    • Intel® Core™ Ultra processor (Series 3)
    • AI experiences powered by a dedicated NPU
    • 13-inch PixelSense™ touchscreen
    • All-day battery life
    Meet Surface Laptop

  • Surface Pro, 12-inch | Snapdragon

    Starting at $1,199.99

    The ultra-portable, powerful, and flexible 2-in-1 PC designed for lightning-fast performance and enhanced AI experiences.

    • Snapdragon® X Plus processor
    • Exceptional battery life
    • 12-inch PixelSense™ Flow touchscreen
    Meet Surface Pro

  • Surface Laptop, 13-inch | Snapdragon

    Starting at $1,299.99

    Powerful, intelligent, and ultra-portable laptop designed for enhanced AI experiences and fast performance.

    • Snapdragon® X Plus processor
    • Exceptional battery life
    • 13-inch PixelSense™ touchscreen
    Meet Surface Laptop

  • Surface Pro, 13-inch (11th Ed.) | Intel

    Starting at $1,699.99

    The versatile 2-in-1 PC designed to boost productivity with exceptional performance and powerful AI capabilities.

    • Intel® Core™ Ultra processor (Series 2)
    • AI-enhanced communication
    • 13-inch PixelSense™ Flow touchscreen
    • Long battery life
    Meet Surface Pro

  • Surface Laptop, 13.8 and 15-inch (7th Ed.) | Intel

    Starting at $1,699.99

    Built for business, with powerful AI capabilities, exceptional performance and long battery life.

    • Intel® Core™ Ultra processor (Series 2)
    • Powerful NPU to drive PC experiences
    • 13.8-inch or 15-inch PixelSense™ Flow touchscreen
    • Optional 5G connectivity on 13.8-inch
    Meet Surface Laptop

  • Surface Pro, 13-inch | Snapdragon

    Starting at $1,449.99

    The flexible 2-in-1 PC designed for enhanced AI experiences, with industry leading AI acceleration to unlock powerful new features.

    • Snapdragon® X Elite and Plus processors
    • Exceptional battery life
    • 13-inch PixelSense™ Flow touchscreen
    • Optional 5G connectivity
    Meet Surface Pro

  • Surface Laptop, 13.8 and 15-inch | Snapdragon

    Starting at $1,449.99

    Ultra-thin laptop designed for enhanced AI experiences, with industry leading AI acceleration to unlock powerful new features.

    • Snapdragon® X Elite and Plus processors
    • Exceptional battery life
    • 13.8-inch or 15-inch PixelSense™ Flow touchscreen
    Meet Surface Laptop

  • Surface Studio 2+

    Starting at $4,499.99

    Find fuel for inspiration on a sleek, versatile all-in-one device that commands attention.

    • 28-inch touchscreen display
    • 11th Gen Intel® Core™ H-35 Processor
    • NVIDIA® GeForce RTX 3060 dGPU
    Meet Surface Studio 2+

  • Surface Hub 3

    An all-in-one digital whiteboard, meetings platform, and collaborative computing device.

    • 50-inch display for smaller spaces
    • 85-inch display for larger rooms
    Meet Surface Hub 3

  • Power cord recall
  • [1] Charger for Surface Slim Pen sold separately. Surface Slim Pen can charge with Surface Slim Pen Charger, Surface Pro Signature Keyboard, Surface Pro X Signature Keyboard, Surface Laptop Studio, and Surface Duo 2 Pen Cover.
  • [2] Sold separately.
  • [3] Detached use requires Windows 11.
  • [4] Requires Windows 11. Battery life varies significantly based on device configuration, usage, network and feature configuration, signal strength, settings and other factors. See aka.ms/SurfaceBatteryPerformance for details.
